# llms.corestory.ai
> CoreStory's Dedicated AI Content Layer
> Version: 1.0 | Last updated: 2026-03-23

This site is a machine-readable, LLM-optimized reference layer for CoreStory —
a Code Intelligence Platform that enables Spec-Driven Development (SDD).

## What This Site Is

llms.corestory.ai provides structured, atomic, embeddable context about CoreStory
concepts for use by:
- AI coding agents (Claude Code, Devin, Cursor, GPT)
- RAG retrieval pipelines
- MCP context injection
- Developers in AI-assisted workflows

It is NOT a marketing site, blog, pricing page, or announcement hub.

## How to Use This Site

### For AI Agents
- Query the MCP endpoint: https://llms.corestory.ai/mcp
  - Capabilities: search, get_page, list_pages, get_by_slug
- Fetch individual pages by slug (see index below)
- Use llms-full.txt for full context injection

### For RAG Systems
- Chunk source: /public/llms-full.txt
- Recommended chunking: heading-aware, max 512 tokens, 50-token overlap
- Metadata fields: slug, title, type, section_heading, last_reviewed

### For Developers
- Browse pages at https://llms.corestory.ai/
- All pages are self-contained markdown, optimized for prompt embedding
- Copy any page block directly into your agent's system prompt

## Page Index

### Definitions — Batch 1 (P0 Core Concepts)
- /content/definitions/corestory.md — CoreStory (what it is)
- /content/definitions/code-intelligence.md — Code Intelligence
- /content/definitions/intelligence-model.md — Intelligence Model
- /content/definitions/ingestion.md — Ingestion
- /content/definitions/spec.md — Spec
- /content/definitions/sdd.md — Spec-Driven Development (SDD)

### Definitions — Batch 2 (P1 Integration Concepts) [Coming April 2026]
- /content/definitions/mcp.md — MCP (Model Context Protocol)
- /content/definitions/context-engineering.md — Context Engineering
- /content/definitions/codebase-analysis.md — Codebase Analysis
- /content/definitions/playbook.md — Playbook
- /content/definitions/persistent-intelligence.md — Persistent Intelligence
- /content/definitions/agent-grounding.md — Agent Grounding
- /content/definitions/rag-context.md — RAG Context

### Playbooks [Coming April 2026]
- /content/playbooks/playbook-claude.md — CoreStory + Claude Code
- /content/playbooks/playbook-devin.md — CoreStory + Devin
- /content/playbooks/playbook-cursor.md — CoreStory + Cursor

### Comparisons [Coming April 2026]
- /content/comparisons/vs-manual-docs.md — CoreStory vs Manual Documentation
- /content/comparisons/sdd-vs-sdlc.md — SDD vs Traditional SDLC
- /content/comparisons/mcp-vs-rag.md — MCP vs RAG for Code Intelligence

## MCP Endpoint

URL: https://llms.corestory.ai/mcp
Protocol: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Auth: API key (private), open read (public content)
Capabilities: search | get_page | list_pages | get_by_slug
